plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: skcal reads your weight and workouts from Apple Health so they are logged for you automatically — no manual entry.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: skcal does not write to Apple Health yet. This permission is reserved for a future option to save your logged weigh-ins back to Health.

plugins.photosPermission: skcal reads the photo you pick so the agent can log the meal in it.
plugins.cameraPermission: skcal uses the camera to snap a meal photo for logging.
